questions: Does the patient present with vertigo? (Yes/No)
Are acute vertigo symptoms present that need short-term control? (Yes/No)
If pharmacological treatment is chosen, which class is selected? (Antihistamine/Benzodiazepine/Anticholinergic)
Are vascular events, demyelination, or neoplasm suspected? (Yes/No)
Are CT/MRI brain, carotid vertebral doppler indicated? (Yes/No)
